---
name: Feature Request 🤓
about: Suggest an idea for LockedIn
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: KartikHalkunde
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always distracted by [...] when I click on [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., "Add a toggle to hide the notification bell.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
